description.en: Bold and fearless, this miner navigates mysterious crypto landscapes, revealing hidden treasures with precision and an adventurous spirit.
description.cn: Bold and fearless, this miner navigates mysterious crypto landscapes, revealing hidden treasures with precision and an adventurous spirit.

description.en: Batteries used to replenish electricity and save efficiency of the miners in your room.
description.cn: Batteries used to replenish electricity and save efficiency of the miners in your room.

description.en: Designed with the tenacity of a locomotive. This rack is built to endure the most intensive crypto-mining operations, mimicking the reliability and heavy-duty performance of trains.
description.cn: Designed with the tenacity of a locomotive. This rack is built to endure the most intensive crypto-mining operations, mimicking the reliability and heavy-duty performance of trains.

description.en: This ancient power has been gathered from The Big Bang, which created our Universe. Unconquerable, immense, and unrivaled when it comes to mining! Four Elements united to bring it to you!
description.cn: This ancient power has been gathered from The Big Bang, which created our Universe. Unconquerable, immense, and unrivaled when it comes to mining! Four Elements united to bring it to you!

description.en: In a world of biohazards and broken labs, one hamster refuses to quit. Small, fearless, and strangely unstoppable — the nightmare has a new resident.
description.cn: In a world of biohazards and broken labs, one hamster refuses to quit. Small, fearless, and strangely unstoppable — the nightmare has a new resident.
description.es: In a world of biohazards and broken labs, one hamster refuses to quit. Small, fearless, and strangely unstoppable — the nightmare has a new resident.
description.pt: In a world of biohazards and broken labs, one hamster refuses to quit. Small, fearless, and strangely unstoppable — the nightmare has a new resident.

description.en: Eight shelves, eight chances to bend the code. Plug in and let the system hum around you.
description.cn: Eight shelves, eight chances to bend the code. Plug in and let the system hum around you.

description.en: A flash sale frenzy in the blockchain! This miner captures the rush of massive discounts, sweeping through blocks like limited-time deals. Each block unlocked is a new bargain in crypto, bringing a haul of digital rewards straight to your wallet.
